name: 7q36_SHH_MNX1_region
description: 7q36.3 distal region containing SHH (Sonic hedgehog) and MNX1 (HLXB9). SHH paralogs IHH (2q35) and DHH (12q13) lie elsewhere but PSV catalog must distinguish them in cross-mapping. 7q36 itself harbors LMBR1-internal ZRS enhancer whose duplication causes limb malformations.

architecture.internal_structure: SHH single-copy at 7q36.3; LMBR1 intronic ZRS is hotspot for ~30-450 kb duplications causing PPD2; cross-genome paralogs IHH/DHH need PSV awareness.
